summary:
Final Walkthrough of the React-First CMS implementation.
Summary of Changes:
- Replaced legacy PHP pages with React Components (`Login.tsx`, `AdminDashboard.tsx`, `ManageNotices.tsx`).
- Created a robust JSON API layer (`api/login.php`, `api/admin/stats.php`, `api/notifications.php`).
- Implemented real-time features like Notifications and Dynamic Notices.
- Verified all flows: Login -> Admin Dashboard -> Create Notice -> Public Notice Board.
